name: ClaudeComputerCommander
description:
Run & Manage Long Processes - install, scrap, encode video, compile
Search & Read & Edit files -  including diff editing for speed and precision

scan_summary.note: Original repo URL wonderwhy-er/ClaudeComputerCommander redirects to wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 161 files analyzed. Found: 8 network, 103 file, 57 env, 13 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 381 findings: 0 critical, 35 high, 132 medium, 214 low. Obfuscation detected!. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 15. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 90%. Deterministic override: high-risk obfuscation detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 15/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 381 scanner findings. Rejected at 90% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
